targets.lsql:
#kubernetes.cluster = "aks-aif-mt-prod-5f94"
and #kubernetes.namespace = /tenant-genai-platform|tenant-askpg|tenant-chatpg|tenant-insightspg|tenant-imagepg|pg-de-cf-genai-platform/
and kubernetes.container.name = "istio-proxy"
and message = /\boutbound\|(?!.*\.svc\.cluster\.local\b)|\bBlackHoleCluster\b/i
| parseCsv(message, delimiter=" ", columns=[start_time, req_details, response_code, response_flags, response_code_details, connection_termination_details, upstream_transport_failure_reason, bytes_received, bytes_sent, duration, resp_envoy_upstream_service_time, req_x_forwarded_for, req_user_agent, req_x_request_id, req_authority, upstream_host, upstream_cluster_raw, upstream_local_address, downstream_local_address, downstream_remote_address, requested_server_name, route_name])
| response_flags != "-" // checks for any unsuccessful connection
| drop(@rawstring)
| parseCsv(downstream_local_address, delimiter=":", columns=[ip, port])
| port != "80" // filters istio blocked connections to check check revoked certificates (not possible to whitelist on istio)
| upstream_host_mask := replace(regex="^.*[|]", field=upstream_cluster_raw)
| requested_server_name := if(requested_server_name == "-", then = upstream_host_mask, else = requested_server_name)
| rename(field=[[#kubernetes.cluster, cluster], [#kubernetes.namespace, namespace], [kubernetes.container.name, container_name], [kubernetes.pod.name, pod_name]])
| select([@timestamp, cluster, namespace, pod_name, container_name, response_code, response_flags, direction, upstream_host_mask, requested_server_name, ip, port])
| groupBy([namespace, upstream_host_mask, requested_server_name, response_flags, port, ip])

#kubernetes.cluster = "aks-aif-mt-prod-5f94"
and #kubernetes.namespace = /tenant-genai-platform|tenant-askpg|tenant-chatpg|tenant-insightspg|tenant-imagepg|pg-de-cf-genai-platform/
and kubernetes.container.name = "istio-proxy"
and message = /\boutbound\|(?!.*\.svc\.cluster\.local\b)|\bBlackHoleCluster\b/i
| parseCsv(message, delimiter=" ", columns=[start_time, req_details, response_code, response_flags, response_code_details, connection_termination_details, upstream_transport_failure_reason, bytes_received, bytes_sent, duration, resp_envoy_upstream_service_time, req_x_forwarded_for, req_user_agent, req_x_request_id, req_authority, upstream_host, upstream_cluster_raw, upstream_local_address, downstream_local_address, downstream_remote_address, requested_server_name, route_name])
| response_flags != "-" // checks for any unsuccessful connection
| drop(@rawstring)
| parseCsv(downstream_local_address, delimiter=":", columns=[ip, port])
| port != "80" // filters istio blocked connections to check check revoked certificates (not possible to whitelist on istio)
| upstream_host_mask := replace(regex="^.*[|]", field=upstream_cluster_raw)
| requested_server_name := if(requested_server_name == "-", then = upstream_host_mask, else = requested_server_name)
| rename(field=[[#kubernetes.cluster, cluster], [#kubernetes.namespace, namespace], [kubernetes.container.name, container_name], [kubernetes.pod.name, pod_name]])
| select([@timestamp, cluster, namespace, pod_name, container_name, response_code, response_flags, direction, upstream_host_mask, requested_server_name, ip, port])
